name: Payload Addition
description: an increase of {x} kg to the payload

name: Friction Decrease Injection
description: a decrease of {reduction_pct}% in the friction coefficient

name: Motor Miscommutation Injection
description: a commutation phase offset of {phase_offset_deg} degrees on {motor}

name: Collision Injection
description: a collision with {object} ({impact_impulse} N-s impact impulse)

name: Foam Collision
description: a collision with a foam cube at {trajectory_fraction} of the trajectory

name: Cardboard Collision
description: a collision with a cardboard box at {trajectory_fraction} of the trajectory

name: Cable Collision
description: a collision with a hanging cable at {trajectory_fraction} of the trajectory

name: Peg Misalignment
description: a {offset_type} offset of {offset_value} in the peg insertion approach
